topic: NVDA recent price action and tariffs
summary: NVDA dropped ~9% on Monday Feb 3 due to tariff fears and export control investigations. Stock went from $186 open to $180 close, with intraday low of $176.
content: Key developments: 1) Trump confirmed 25% tariffs on Canada/Mexico imports. 2) Investigations into Chinese buyers bypassing US export controls. 3) Trump enacted 25% tariff on certain advanced chips (Jan 14). 4) NVDA stock dropped from ~$192 peak on Jan 29 to $180 on Feb 3 - about a 6% decline in a few days. The Feb 3 close at $180.34 represents the lowest close in about 3 weeks. Still far from $100 though. This recent volatility could push some forecasters to update the underlying question's probability upward.
